name: Birth of a Soul
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The team's Max HP +10%. The Healing and Shield provided by the wielder increase by [StateArg3]%. After playing the wielder's "Strike," restore [StateArg1]% of lost HP. After playing the wielder's "Defense," gain Shield equal to [StateArg2]% of current life. This effect can trigger up to 1 time each per turn.
lore:
The strings of time snap one by one, and the flowing keys shatter in turn.

Standing beyond reality, They repair the rifts with the fabric of reality itself, so the unending symphony may sound again in the high heavens.

As for where the tears shed upon waking flow, no one knows.
